[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 1010001 3
4 1010100 3
5 0000100 1
6 1101111 6
7 1100101 4

01 10 1010000 2
12 21 0000100 1 match 5
23 32 0000100 1 match 5
34 43 1100101 4 match 7

56 65 1110001 4
67 76 0100010 2
70 07 0000000 a match 0 1 2

02 20 0000000 a match 0 1 2
13 31 1000100 2
24 42 0000100 1 match 5
35 53 1100001 3

57 75 0100000 1
60 06 1010001 3 match 3
71 17 0000100 1 match 5

36 63 1100011 4

50 05 1010001 3 match 3
61 16 1010000 2
72 27 0000100 1 match 5

26 62 0000000 a match 0 1 2
